assumptions: The developer has a supported browser, terminal, and a runtime for one documented SDK tab.
No OpenAI Platform account, organization, API key, or project credentials exist yet.
The intended outcome is the Developer quickstart's first Responses API call.

developer_goal: Create an OpenAI Platform account, obtain an API key, and run the official Developer quickstart until the first Responses API call prints model output.

first_success.outcome: A documented SDK or CLI client sends a Responses API request and prints the model-generated text.
first_success.observable_signal: Running the quickstart example prints output text; the page then states Congrats on running a free test API request.

route_selection.surface: OpenAI Platform Dashboard plus Developer quickstart
route_selection.rule: Lexicographic shortest complete route from account creation to the documented free test API request, after fixing language SDK and billing eligibility.

candidates.name: Dashboard API key + JavaScript Responses quickstart
candidates.reason: Documented after an API key exists, but fresh-account signup fields and free-test eligibility are not publicly enumerated.

candidates.name: Dashboard API key + Python or other SDK tab
candidates.reason: Equal consequential SDK tabs reach the same first-success type with different install and file steps; no recommended default is named.

candidates.name: Paid credits path before first call
candidates.reason: Add credits appears after the free-test congrats text, but eligibility for that free test is undefined on the page.

required_path.action: Create or sign in to an OpenAI Platform account that can open the API keys dashboard.

required_fields.label: Account identity and authentication inputs
required_fields.notes: platform.openai.com/signup did not expose a complete public field list without an authenticated or JS-complete session.

required_path.observable_result: The developer can open the authenticated Platform dashboard used to create API keys.

required_path.action: Create an API key in the OpenAI dashboard and store it securely.

required_fields.label: API key creation controls
required_fields.notes: Docs require creating a key in the dashboard but do not publish the exact form fields.

required_path.observable_result: A secret API key value is available to the developer once.
The shell environment exposes the key to the official SDK.

required_path.action: Install the official SDK for the selected language tab.

required_fields.label: SDK install command
required_fields.notes: Exact package command depends on the unresolved language tab.

required_path.observable_result: The OpenAI client library is available in the project.

required_path.action: Create the documented Responses API example file for the selected language.
required_path.observable_result: The project contains the quickstart example ready to run.

required_path.action: Run the example and confirm model output is printed.
required_path.observable_result: The terminal prints model-generated text for the free test request when the account is eligible.

prerequisites.description: A runtime matching the selected SDK tab (for example Node.js for the JavaScript example).

external_gates.description: Dashboard authentication and organization membership are required before an API key can be created.
Whether the free test API request is available without adding credits depends on undocumented account state.

platform_outcomes.description: OpenAI issues an API key from the dashboard.
The Responses API returns model-generated text for a successful request.

excluded.item: Reading additional guides after the first API call
excluded.reason: Analyze images, Agents SDK, and similar sections follow the named free-test congrats boundary.
The quickstart places Go to billing after Congrats on running a free test API request.

sources.title: OpenAI Platform signup
evidence_supported: Complete signup field list not available without authenticated or JS-complete session

uncertainties.question: What exact signup, verification, organization, and API-key form fields does a brand-new Platform user complete?
uncertainties.impact: These controls change required actions and fields before the documented quickstart begins.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: A dated read-only walkthrough or screenshots from a fresh Platform signup through first API key creation.

uncertainties.question: Which account states receive the free test API request without adding credits, and which language SDK tab is the canonical shortest route?
uncertainties.impact: Billing gates and SDK choice change action counts and whether first success is reachable without payment.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Official eligibility statement for the free test plus a named recommended language route, or a fresh-account confirmation of no billing gate.
